title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Program (SIP) for Cy 2021 Amounting to Nine Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P 900,000.00) for the Implementation of the Microplan for Covid-19 Vaccination of the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Municipal Health Office.
